english: Why is life given to a man whose way is hidden whom God has hedged in

english: For sighing has become my daily food my groans pour out like water
lunyoro: Baitu okusinda kwange nukuija ntakalire Nokuiguza kwange kusesekere nkamaizi

english: What I feared has come upon me what I dreaded has happened to me
lunyoro: Baitu eki ekindukutina nikimpikaho Kandi eki ekintukumira kiizire namberendi

english: I have no peace no quietness I have no rest but only turmoil
lunyoro: Tintina obusinge kunu tinculire kunu tintungire okuhumura Baitu obujune nabuija

english: Then Eliphaz the Temanite replied
lunyoro: NUBWO Erifazi Omutemani yagarukamu yagamba ati

english: If someone ventures a word with you will you be impatient But who can keep from speaking
lunyoro: Omuntu obwaralengaho okubaza naiwe orabihirwa baitu noha asobora okweyigaliriza okutagamba

english: Think how you have instructed many how you have strengthened feeble hands
lunyoro: Dora iwe okegesa baingi kandi wagumya emikono emiceke

english: Your words have supported those who stumbled you have strengthened faltering knees
lunyoro: Ebigambo bwage bikasagika ogu akaba ali haihi okugwa Kandi wagumya amaju agatanyina amani

english: But now trouble comes to you and you are discouraged it strikes you and you are dismayed
lunyoro: Baitu hati bunu kihikire namberoli kandi oruhirire Kikukozireho kandi otuntuzibwe

english: Should not your piety be your confidence and your blameless ways your hope
lunyoro: Okutina Ruhanga kwawe tinubwo bwesige bwawe Nokunihira kwawe okuhikira okwemihanda yawe

english: Consider now Who being innocent has ever perished Where were the upright ever destroyed
lunyoro: Ijuka nkwesengerize noha arahwerekerire atanyina musango Rundi abahikirire baramalirweho nkaha

english: As I have observed those who plow evil and those who sow trouble reap it
lunyoro: Nka nyowe okunaboine abo abalima okutahikira Nibasiga obubi nibyo bagesa

english: At the breath of God they perish at the blast of his anger they are no more
lunyoro: Habworwoya rwa Ruhanga bahwerekera Kandi habwekiyaga ekyekinigakye bamarwaho

english: The lions may roar and growl yet the teeth of the great lions are broken
lunyoro: Okububura okwentale niraka eryentale erukuruma namaino agentale ensigazi gacwekere

english: The lion perishes for lack of prey and the cubs of the lioness are scattered
lunyoro: Entale engurusi efa baitu omuhigo gugisiga Nobwana obwebtale ebuguma burarangana hona

english: A word was secretly brought to me my ears caught a whisper of it
lunyoro: Lero ekigambo kikandeterwa omu nsita Okutu kwange kwahura nkokubaza ebihwa

english: Amid disquieting dreams in the night when deep sleep falls on people
lunyoro: Omu kutekereza okurukuruga omu biroto ebyekiro Oturo otwingi obutukwata abantu

english: fear and trembling seized me and made all my bones shake
lunyoro: Okutina kwankwata nokutukumira Kwatengesa amagufa gange gona

english: A spirit glided past my face and the hair on my body stood on end
lunyoro: Nubwo omuzimu gwarabaho omu maiso gange Obwoya obwomubiri gwange bwasasuka

english: It stopped but I could not tell what it was A form stood before my eyes and I heard a hushed voice
lunyoro: Gwayemeraho baitu ntasobole okwetegereza okusisana kwagwo Ekiituru kikaba kiri omu maiso gange Haculera nahura iraka ngu

english: Can a mortal be more righteous than God Can even a strong man be more pure than his Maker
lunyoro: Omuntu arukufa alikira Ruhanga okuhikira Omuntu alisemera okukira Omuhangiwe

english: If God places no trust in his servants if he charges his angels with error
lunyoro: Dora tarukwesiga na kake abairube Na bamaraikabe abatera obudoma

english: how much more those who live in houses of clay whose foundations are in the dust who are crushed more readily than a moth
lunyoro: Kirisura ki hali abo abaikara omu nju ezitaka Emiganda yabu eri omu cucu Abasasangurwa omu maiso genyenje

english: Between dawn and dusk they are broken to pieces unnoticed they perish forever
lunyoro: Omu mwanya gwa nyenkya na kairirizi bacwacwanwa babura okuhikya ebiro byona kunu gusaho akitaho omutima

english: Are not the cords of their tent pulled up so that they die without wisdom
lunyoro: Omuguha gwabu ogwehema tiguihwa omunda yabu bafa kandi hataroho magezi

english: Call if you will but who will answer you To which of the holy ones will you turn
lunyoro: KUNGA haroho nomu alikugarukamu Kandi olihindukira oha omu barukwera

english: Resentment kills a fool and envy slays the simple
lunyoro: Baitu okubihirwa nukuita omuntu omudomadoma Kandi nihali niriita omusema

english: I myself have seen a fool taking root but suddenly his house was cursed
lunyoro: Nkarora omudomadoma nasimba emihama Baitu ahonaho nakyena ekiikarokye ekyokuikaramu

english: His children are far from safety crushed in court without a defender
lunyoro: Abanabe bali hara nobusinge kandi basasangurwa omu irembo Kunu tiharoho owokubajuna

english: The hungry consume his harvest taking it even from among thorns and the thirsty pant after his wealth
lunyoro: Amagesa gabu omujara agalya Nagaiha nomu mahwa Kandi obuhya bwasamira ebintu byabu

english: For hardship does not spring from the soil nor does trouble sprout from the ground
lunyoro: Baitu omuhito tiguruga omu cucu Nobubwakuba obujune tibwaruka omu itaka

english: Yet man is born to trouble as surely as sparks fly upward
lunyoro: Baitu omuntu azarwa obujune Nkakasazi okugataraka haiguru

english: But if I were you I would appeal to God I would lay my cause before him
lunyoro: Baitu nyowe nakuseruire Ruhanga Kandi Ruhanga nuwe nakusigire obulyo bwange

english: He performs wonders that cannot be fathomed miracles that cannot be counted
lunyoro: Arukukora ebigambo ebikuru kandi ebitarukuserwa Ebyamahano ebitabarwa omuhendo

english: He provides rain for the earth he sends water on the countryside
lunyoro: Anaga enjura ha nsi nasindika amaizi omu misiri

english: The lowly he sets on high and those who mourn are lifted to safety
lunyoro: Nukwo anyumiza haiguru abo abaganya baimukibwa okuikara nobusinge

english: He thwarts the plans of the crafty so that their hands achieve no success
lunyoro: Aburanganiza okuhyangya kwabagobya Nikyo engaro zabu ziremera okuhikiriza ekibatandika

english: He catches the wise in their craftiness and the schemes of the wily are swept away
lunyoro: Akwata abamagezi omukuhyangya kwabu bonka Nokuhuhanura okwabamyehembo kujumikirwa kimu

english: Darkness comes upon them in the daytime at noon they grope as in the night
lunyoro: batangatangana nomuirima enyamusana Nibahamanga omu ihangwe nkekiro

english: He saves the needy from the sword in their mouth he saves them from the clutches of the powerful
lunyoro: baitu uwe ajuna hali busitama eyakanwa kabu Abanaku omu Mukono gwowamani

english: So the poor have hope and injustice shuts its mouth
lunyoro: Nukwo omunaku aba nokunihira Nokutahikira nukubumba akanwa kakwo

english: Blessed is the one whom God corrects so do not despise the discipline of the Almighty
lunyoro: Dora anyina omugisa omuntu ogu Ruhanga owahana nukwo otaligaya okubonabonesa Kwowobusobozi bwona

english: For he wounds but he also binds up he injures but his hands also heal
lunyoro: Baitu asaliza kandi aboha Ahutaza kandi engaroze zikiza

english: From six calamities he will rescue you in seven no harm will touch you
lunyoro: Alikujuna omu bujune mukaga Ego omu musanju akabi kona yikalikukoraho

english: In famine he will deliver you from death and in battle from the stroke of the sword
lunyoro: Omu njara alikucungura omu kufa Nomu bulemu hali obusobozi bwa Busitama

english: You will be protected from the lash of the tongue and need not fear when destruction comes
lunyoro: Oliserekwa hali okubata okworulimi Kunu otalitina okuhwerekera obukulihika

english: You will laugh at destruction and famine and need not fear the wild animals
lunyoro: Okuhwerekera nenjara olibiseka Kunu otalitina enyamaiswa ezensi

english: For you will have a covenant with the stones of the field and the wild animals will be at peace with you
lunyoro: Baitu oliragana ekiragano namabale gomu bwere Nenyamaiswa ezomu kisaka ziriterana naiwe nobusinge

english: You will know that your tent is secure you will take stock of your property and find nothing missing
lunyoro: Kandi olimanya ehema yawe ikaire nobusige Kandi olibungira isibiko lyawe kunu toliburwa kintu

english: You will know that your children will be many and your descendants like the grass of the earth
lunyoro: Kandi olimanya oruzaro rwawe okuruliba rukur Nabaijukuru bawe nkobunyansi bwitaka

english: You will come to the grave in full vigor like sheaves gathered in season
lunyoro: Olihika ha kina kyawe ogurusire muno nkekiba kyengano okukihunikwa omu kasumi hakyo

english: We have examined this and it is true So hear it and apply it to yourself
lunyoro: Dora eki tukakisera nukwo kiri kiti Kihure okimanye obwomugisa gwawe

english: Then Job replied
lunyoro: NUBWO Yobu yagarukamu nagamba ati

english: If only my anguish could be weighed and all my misery be placed on the scales
lunyoro: Ai bambi kuba obujune bwange bulengerwe Nomuhito gwange gutairwe omu minzani hamu

english: It would surely outweigh the sand of the seas no wonder my words have been impetuous
lunyoro: Baitu byakukizire obulemezi omusenyi gweyanja Nikyo ebigambo byange byanguhire

english: The arrows of the Almighty are in me my spirit drinks in their poison Gods terrors are marshaled against me
lunyoro: Baitu engobe Zowobusobozi bwona ziri omunda yange Obusegwe omwoyo gwange obugunywa Ebirukutinisa ebya Ruhangabyesimbire enyiri okurwana nanyowe

english: Does a wild donkey bray when it has grass or is there an ox bellow when it has fodder
lunyoro: Entulege egamba etungire obunyansi Rundi ente enuga obwerya ebyokulya byayo

english: Is tasteless food eaten without salt or is there flavor in the sap of the mallow
lunyoro: Eki ekitarumu rusa nikiribwa hatali ekisura Rundi harumu okunura omu maizi gihuli

english: I refuse to touch it such food makes me ill
lunyoro: Obwomezi bwange bwangire okubikoraho Nibisisana namberendi nkebyokulya ebinugwa

english: Oh that I might have my request that God would grant what I hope for
lunyoro: Kuba ninsobora okutunga ekindukusaba Ruhanga ampe ekindukwegomba

english: that God would be willing to crush me to let loose his hand and cut off my life
lunyoro: Kuba Ruhanga aikirize okunsasangura Alekere omukonogwe amaleho

english: Then I would still have this consolation my joy in unrelenting pain that I had not denied the words of the Holy One
lunyoro: Nubwo nakutungire okuhumuzibwa Ego nakugumisisrize okusasa okutarukuganyira baitu tinyangire ebigambo bya Arukwera

english: What strength do I have that I should still hope What prospects that I should be patient
lunyoro: Amani gange kiki nyowe ntegereze Nempero yange kiki nyowe ngumusirize

english: Do I have the strength of stone Is my flesh bronze
lunyoro: Amani gange nigo mani gamabale Rundi omubiri gwange gwomulinga

english: Do I have any power to help myself now that success has been driven from me
lunyoro: Tinikyo kinu nyowe okutaba nokukonyerwe omuli nyowe Kandi okukora okurukugasa kubingirwe kimu namberendi

english: Anyone who withholds kindness from a friend forsakes the fear of the Almighty
lunyoro: Ogu ali haihi okuruhira kihikirire enganjaniye amugire embabazi Ogu asana okuleka okutina Wobusobozi bwona

english: But my brothers are as undependable as intermittent streams as the streams that overflow
lunyoro: Bagenzi bange bakozire nobugobya nkakambu Nkomuhera gwobwambu oguhwaho

english: when darkened by thawing ice and swollen with melting snow
lunyoro: Obuiragura habwamaizi agakwasire Nambere ebirika byesereka

english: but that stop flowing in the dry season and in the heat vanish from their channels
lunyoro: Obubutagara bubura Okwokya obukubaho buhwaho omu kiikaro kyabwo

english: Caravans turn aside from their routes they go off into the wasteland and perish
lunyoro: Esafali ezigenda ha rubaju rwabwo zihunguka batemba omu irungu bahwerekera

english: The caravans of Tema look for water the traveling merchants of Sheba look in hope
lunyoro: Esafali za Tema zasera Ebitebe bya Seba byabategereza

english: They are distressed because they had been confident they arrive there only to be disappointed
lunyoro: Bakwatwa ensoni baitu bakaba nibanihira Bahikayo baburangana

english: Now you too have proved to be of no help you see something dreadful and are afraid
lunyoro: Baitu hati bunu inywe timuli kintu Nimurora ekirukutinisa nimutina

english: Have I ever said Give something on my behalf pay a ransom for me from your wealth
lunyoro: Nkagamba nti Mumpe Rundi nti Muheyo ekisembo habwange omu bintu byanyu

english: deliver me from the hand of the enemy rescue me from the clutches of the ruthless
lunyoro: Rundi Munjune omu Mukono gwomunyanzigwa Rundi nti Muncungule omu Mukono gwabarukwendereza

english: Teach me and I will be quiet show me where I have been wrong
lunyoro: Munyegese kandi ndaculera Mumanyise ekinasobeze

english: How painful are honest words But what do your arguments prove
lunyoro: Ebigambo ebyokuhikira ka byamani Baitu okuhakana kwanyu nukuhana ki

english: Do you mean to correct what I say and treat my desperate words as wind
lunyoro: Inywe nimutekereza okuhana ebigambo Baitu ebigambo byomuntu alekere okunihira biba nkorwoya kwonka

english: You would even cast lots for the fatherless and barter away your friend
lunyoro: Ego inywe mwakutomire atanyina ise Nimusagisa amagoba ha nganjani yanyu

english: But now be so kind as to look at me Would I lie to your face
lunyoro: Nukwo hati bunu muikirize okundolera Baitu mazimakwo timbihe bisuba omu maiso ganyu

english: Relent do not be unjust reconsider for my integrity is at stake
lunyoro: Mugaruke mbesengerize hatabaho okutahikira Ego mugarukemu obulyo bwange buhikirire

english: Is there any wickedness on my lips Can my mouth not discern malice
lunyoro: Haroho okutahikira ha rulimi rwange Okuroza kwange tikurukusobora okubaganizamu ebireta akabi

english: Do not mortals have hard service on earth Are not their days like those of hired laborers
lunyoro: ABANTU tibanyina obulemu ha nsi Nebirobye tibirukusisana nkebiro byomuntu akolereza empera

english: Like a slave longing for the evening shadows or a hired laborer waiting to be paid
lunyoro: Nkomuiru ayegomba ekiituro Nkanyakukolereza empera okwarolera omusaragwe

english: so I have been allotted months of futility and nights of misery have been assigned to me
lunyoro: Nukwo nagweserwe amezi agatarumu Nebiro ebitali byokuhumura nibyo byanterirweho

english: When I lie down I think How long before I get up The night drags on and I toss and turn until dawn
lunyoro: Obumbyama ningamba nti Ndaimuka di Baitu ekiro kyeyongera Nimbugabuga okukiisa obuire

english: My body is clothed with worms and scabs my skin is broken and festering
lunyoro: Omubiri gwange gujwaire enzito nobukama bwecucu Oruhu rwange ruigara kandi rugaruka okucweka

english: My days are swifter than a weavers shuttle and they come to an end without hope
lunyoro: Ebiro byange nibyanguha okukira entabalizi yomuruki wengoye Nimbimaraho hatali kunihira

english: Remember O God that my life is but a breath my eyes will never see happiness again
lunyoro: Ai bambi ijuka obwomezi bwange nurwo rwoya kwonka Eriso lyange tiririgaruka okubona ebirungi

english: The eye that now sees me will see me no longer you will look for me but I will be no more
lunyoro: Eriso lyogu arukumbona tirigaruka okumbona Amaiso gawe galindolera baitu tindibaho

english: As a cloud vanishes and is gone so one who goes down to the grave does not return
lunyoro: Nkekiho okukihwaho nikibura Nukwo ogu asirimuka okuzimu taligaruka okukununuka

english: He will never come to his house again his place will know him no more
lunyoro: Taligaruka obundi omu njuye Kunu ekiikarokye tikirigaruka okumumanya

english: Therefore I will not keep silent I will speak out in the anguish of my spirit I will complain in the bitterness of my soul
lunyoro: Nikyo ntalitangira akanwa kange Ndigamba omu kusalirwa okwomwoyo gwange Ndihyema habwokusara okwomu bwomezi bwange

english: Am I the sea or the monster of the deep that you put me under guard
lunyoro: Ninyowe nyanja rundi endyoka eyomu nyanja Iwe okuntaho abokundolera

english: When I think my bed will comfort me and my couch will ease my complaint
lunyoro: Obungamba nti Ekitabu kyange kirampumuza Okubyama kwange kurakehya okuhyema kwange

english: even then you frighten me with dreams and terrify me with visions
lunyoro: Nubwo ontinisa nebiroto Nonkanga nokolekwa

english: so that I prefer strangling and death rather than this body of mine
lunyoro: Nukwo obwomezi bwange nubwegomboza okunigwa Nokufa okukira amagufa gange ganu

english: I despise my life I would not live forever Let me alone my days have no meaning
lunyoro: Ninuga obwomezi bwange tindukwenda okwomera ebiro byona Ndeka baitu ebiro byange nibyo bitarimu

english: What is mankind that you make so much of them that you give them so much attention
lunyoro: Omuntu kiki iwe okumunyumiza Nokumutaho omutima gwawe Nokumubungira obukyabukya Nokumulengalenga okutaikya

english: that you examine them every morning and test them every moment
lunyoro: Olihikya nkaha okutanyihaho amaiso gawe Kandi okutandeka omwanya mire amacwanta gange

english: Will you never look away from me or let me alone even for an instant
lunyoro: Obundabe nsisire iwe omurolerezi wabantu Kiki ontaireho nkekintu kyawe ekyokubara engobe Nukwo okulemara ninyeremeza nyenka

english: If I have sinned what have I done to you you who see everything we do Why have you made me your target Have I become a burden to you Why do you not pardon my offenses and forgive my sins For I will soon lie down in the dust you will search for me but I will be no more
lunyoro: Kiki okutaganyira ekyokusisa kyange Noihaho okutahikira kwange Baitu hati ndabyama omu cucu Kandi olyekamba okunsera baitu tindibaho

english: Then Bildad the Shuhite replied How long will you say such things Your words are a blustering wind
lunyoro: NUBWO Biridadi Omusuha yagarukamu nagamba ati Olihikya nkaha okugamba ebigambo ebi Ebigambo byakanwa kawe birihikya nkaha okusisana nkomuyaga gwamani

english: Does God pervert justice Does the Almighty pervert what is right
lunyoro: Ruhanga nacwerera emisango Rundi Wobusobozi bwona nacwerera ebyobulyo

english: When your children sinned against him he gave them over to the penalty of their sin
lunyoro: Abana bawe obubaraba bamusisire Kandi abaihaireyo omu mukono gwokusisa kwabu

english: But if you will seek God earnestly and plead with the Almighty
lunyoro: Iwe obworayekamba okusera Ruhanga Noyesengereza Wobusobozi bwona

english: if you are pure and upright even now he will rouse himself on your behalf and restore you to your prosperous state Your beginnings will seem humble so prosperous will your future be
lunyoro: Kuba obaire osemire kandi ohikirire Mazimakwo hati bunu yakusisimukire habwawe Naha omugisa ekiikaro kyawe ekyokuhikira

english: Ask the former generation and find out what their ancestors learned
lunyoro: Okubanza kwawe nobukukaba kuli kuke Emparo yawe eyahanyuma yakukyanire muno

english: for we were born only yesterday and know nothing and our days on earth are but a shadow Will they not instruct you and tell you Will they not bring forth words from their understanding
lunyoro: Baitu kaguza nkwesengerize ebyebiro byaira Oteho omutima gwawe hali ebi baisenkurubo ebibaseruire

english: for we were born only yesterday and know nothing and our days on earth are but a shadow
lunyoro: Baitu itwe tuli ba ijo titumanyire kigambo Baitu ebiri byaitu ebya ha nsi kiituru kyonka

english: Will they not instruct you and tell you Will they not bring forth words from their understanding
lunyoro: Bo tibalikwegesa nibakutebeza Nibagamba ebigambo ebiruga omu mutima gwabu

english: Can papyrus grow tall where there is no marsh Can reeds thrive without water
lunyoro: Orufunjo nurusobora okumera hataloho sabu Omubimbiri nugusobora okumera hataroho maizi

english: While still growing and uncut they wither more quickly than grass
lunyoro: Obugukiri omubisi gutakatemerwe Gwanguha okuhotoka okukira ebinyansi ebindi byona

english: Such is the destiny of all who forget God so perishes the hope of the godless
lunyoro: Nukwo emihanda eri eya bona abarukwebwa Ruhanga Kandi okunihira kwomu ntu atarukutina Ruhanga kulibura

english: What they trust in is fragile what they rely on is a spiders web
lunyoro: Obwesigebwe bulicweka hagati Kandi okwesigakwe kuli ha nju yenyamububi

english: They lean on the web but it gives way they cling to it but it does not hold
lunyoro: Alyesigamira ha njuye baitu terigumaho Aligikwata namani baitu teriikaraho

english: They are like a wellwatered plant in the sunshine spreading its shoots over the garden it entwines its roots around a pile of rocks and looks for a place among the stones
lunyoro: Ali mubisi omu maiso gizoba Nobutagibwe bugaliha okuhikya orugonjorwe

english: But when it is torn from its spot that place disowns it and says I never saw you
lunyoro: Emihamaye ekwata ha mutamo Arora ekiikaro ekyamabale

english: Surely its life withers away and from the soil other plants grow
lunyoro: Obwalihwerekera omu kiikarokye Nubwo kirimwehakana ngu Tinkuboine

english: Surely God does not reject one who is blameless or strengthen the hands of evildoers
lunyoro: Dora nukwo kusemererwa okomuhandagwe Kandi omu itaka halirugamu abandi

english: He will yet fill your mouth with laughter and your lips with shouts of joy
lunyoro: Dora Ruhanga talinaga omuntu ahikirire Kunu talisagaki abakozi bobubi

english: Your enemies will be clothed in shame and the tents of the wicked will be no more
lunyoro: Aligaruka okuijuza akanwa kawa nokuseka Neminwa yawe nokutoka

english: Then Job replied Indeed I know that this is true But how can mere mortals prove their innocence before God
lunyoro: NUBWO Yobu yagarukamu nagamba ati Mazimakwo manyire nukwo kiri kiti Baitu omuntu nasobora ata okuhikira omu maiso ga Ruhanga

english: Though they wished to dispute with him they could not answer him one time out of a thousand
lunyoro: Obwaganza okuhakana nauwe Tarukusobora okumugarukamu ekigambo kimu omu bigambo rukumi

english: His wisdom is profound his power is vast Who has resisted him and come out unscathed
lunyoro: Wamagezi omu mutima kandi wobusobozi omu mani Noha aragumangaine okurwana nauwe yabona omugisa

english: He moves mountains without their knowing it and overturns them in his anger
lunyoro: Aihura ensozi kunu tizimanyire Obwazijumika omu kubihirwakwe

english: He shakes the earth from its place and makes its pillars tremble
lunyoro: Atengesa ensi omu kiikarokye Nenyomyo zayo nizitengeta

english: He speaks to the sun and it does not shine he seals off the light of the stars
lunyoro: Aragira izoba lireka okurugayo Aboha enyunyuzi nemanyikirizo

english: He alone stretches out the heavens and treads on the waves of the sea
lunyoro: Nuwe wenka abamba iguru Nalibata ebigonzi ebyenyanja

english: He is the Maker of the Bear and Orion the Pleiades and the constellations of the south
lunyoro: Akora Akasebu Ebisuma na Kakaga Nemyanya eyobukizi bwobulyo

english: He performs wonders that cannot be fathomed miracles that cannot be counted
lunyoro: Akora ebigambo ebikuru ebihinguraine okuzorwa Ego ebigambo ebyamahano ebitali byomuhendo

english: When he passes me I cannot see him when he goes by I cannot perceive him

lunyoro: Habwomwoyogwe iguru nirikunisiba Omukonogwe gukacumita enjoka erukuiruka

english: And these are but the outer fringe of his works how faint the whisper we hear of him Who then can understand the thunder of his power
lunyoro: Dora nizo mbaju zonka ezemihandaye Nakagambo akatumuhuraho ka kake muno Baitu okuhindakwe okwobusobozi noha asobora okukwetegereza

english: As surely as God lives who has denied me justice the Almighty who has made my life bitter
lunyoro: Nka Ruhanga okwali omwomezi ayaihireho obulyo bwange Nowobusobozi bwona ayasalize obwomezi bwange

english: as long as I have life within me the breath of God in my nostrils
lunyoro: Baitu obwomezi bwange bukiri omuli nyowe Norwoya rwa Ruhanga ruli omu nyindo zange

english: my lips will not say anything wicked and my tongue will not utter lies
lunyoro: Mananukwo eminwa yange teribaza okutahikira Kunu orulimi rwange tiruligamba ebisuba

english: I will never admit you are in the right till I die I will not deny my integrity
lunyoro: Tikisoboka nyowe okubaihaho omusango Okuhikya okufa kwange tidyeyihaho okuhikirakwange

english: I will maintain my innocence and never let go of it my conscience will not reproach me as long as I live
lunyoro: Okuhikira kwange ninkukwatira kimu tindikuleka na kake Omutima gwange gutalincwera omusango obunkiri omwomezi

english: May my enemy be like the wicked my adversary like the unjust
lunyoro: Omunyanzigwa wange abe nkababi Ogu anyimukira abe nkatali wokuhikira

english: For what hope have the godless when they are cut off when God takes away their life
lunyoro: Baitu okunihira kwatarukutina Ruhanga kulinkaha nobwatunga itungo Ruhanga obwamuihaho obwomezibwe

english: Does God listen to their cry when distress comes upon them
lunyoro: Ruhanga alihura okukungakwe Obujune obubumuhikaho

english: Will they find delight in the Almighty Will they call on God at all times
lunyoro: Ogu alisemererwa Owobusobozi bwona Nakunga Ruhanga obutosa

english: I will teach you about the power of God the ways of the Almighty I will not conceal
lunyoro: Ndabegesa ebyomukono gwa Ruhanga Eki ekirir Nowobusobozi bwona tinkisereke

english: You have all seen this yourselves Why then this meaningless talk
lunyoro: Dora inywe inywena mukiboine inywenka Nukwo kiki ekyabafoire nkabatarukugasa na kake

english: Here is the fate God allots to the wicked the heritage a ruthless man receives from the Almighty
lunyoro: Gunu nugwo mugabo gwomuntu omubi ahali Ruhanga Nobugwetwa gwaberengera obubahabwa hali Owobusobozi bwona

english: However many his children their fate is the sword his offspring will never have enough to eat
lunyoro: Abanabe obubakanya buli bakanyire busitama Nabaijukurube tibalitera empamo

english: The plague will bury those who survive him and their widows will not weep for them
lunyoro: Abo abasigaraho barazikwaga omu kufa Nabafakatibe tibalitera empamo

english: Though he heaps up silver like dust and clothes like piles of clay
lunyoro: Nobwakanyisa efeza nkecucu Natekaniza ebyokujwara nkiitaka

english: what he lays up the righteous will wear and the innocent will divide his silver
lunyoro: Rundi abitekaniza baitu abahikirire balijwara Nabatanyina omusango balibagana efeza

english: The house he builds is like a moths cocoon like a hut made by a watchman
lunyoro: Ayombeka enjuye nkenyamambubi Kandi nkorukande omulinzi orwatema

english: He lies down wealthy but will do so no more when he opens his eyes all is gone
lunyoro: Abyama ali muguda baitu talisorozebwa Aigura amaisoge baitu afire

english: Terrors overtake him like a flood a tempest snatches him away in the night
lunyoro: Epumpu zimukwata nkamaizi Ekiyaga kimuiba ekiro

english: The east wind carries him off and he is gone it sweeps him out of his place
lunyoro: Omuyaga ogwoburugaizoba gumuihaho agenda Gumusingora omu kiikarokye

english: It hurls itself against him without mercy as he flees headlong from its power
lunyoro: Baitu Ruhanga alimuhungura kunu taliganyira Okugopnza nagonza okuiruka omukonogwe

english: It claps its hands in derision and hisses him out of his place
lunyoro: Abantu balimutera enkwakwa Balimusimuza okumubinga omu kiikarokye

english: There is a mine for silver and a place where gold is refined
lunyoro: haroo enambo eyefeza Kandi ekiihiro kyezabu eyibasemeza

english: Iron is taken from the earth and copper is smelted from ore
lunyoro: Obutale buihwa omu itaka Kandi omulinga gwagibwa nuguihwa omu ibale

english: Mortals put an end to the darkness they search out the farthest recesses for ore in the blackest darkness
lunyoro: Abantu bamaraho omuirima Nibasera okuhikya ha mpero mali

english: Far from human dwellings they cut a shaft in places untouched by human feet far from other people they dangle and sway
lunyoro: Alima enambo hara nabanbtu nambere baikara Bebwa ekigere ekihinguraho Balengija hara nabantu besusasusa

english: The earth from which food comes is transformed below as by fire
lunyoro: Baitu omu itaka harugamu ebyokulya Kandi hansi lijumikwa nkokulijumikwa omuro

english: lapis lazuli comes from its rocks and its dust contains nuggets of gold
lunyoro: Amabale gayo kiihiro kya safiro Kandi enyina ecucu ya zabu

english: No bird of prey knows that hidden path no falcons eye has seen it
lunyoro: Omuhanda ogu busaho empungu egumanyire Kunu eriso eryamalere litagubone

english: Proud beasts do not set foot on it and no lion prowls there
lunyoro: Enyamaiswa ezemyehembo itagulibate Kunu entale erukuruma etagurabemu

english: People assault the flinty rock with their hands and lay bare the roots of the mountains
lunyoro: Agora omukonogwe ha ibale erigumire dai Ajumika ensozi nemihama yazo

english: They tunnel through the rock their eyes see all its treasures
lunyoro: Alima emikura omu mabale Kandi eriso lirora ekintu ttona ekyomuhendo

english: They search the sources of the rivers and bring hidden things to light
lunyoro: Aigara emigezi ereke okukenenuka Kandi ekintu ekyaserekerwe akireta hali omusana

english: But where can wisdom be found Where does understanding dwell
lunyoro: Baitu amagezi galizoka nkaha nekiikaro ekyokwetegereza kiri nkaha

english: No mortal comprehends its worth it cannot be found in the land of the living
lunyoro: Omuntu tamanyire omuhendo gwago Kunu tigazoka omu nsi yabomezi

english: The deep says It is not in me the sea says It is not with me
lunyoro: Enziha nizigamba bgu Tigali omuli nyowe Nenyanja egamba eti Tigali nanyowe

english: It cannot be bought with the finest gold nor can its price be weighed out in silver
lunyoro: Tigasobora okutungwa habwezabu Kunu efeza tizirirengwa habwomuhendo gwago

english: It cannot be bought with the gold of Ophir with precious onyx or lapis lazuli
lunyoro: Tigasobora okuramurwa nezabu ya Ofiri Nonukisi eyomuhendo rundi na safiro

english: Neither gold nor crystal can compare with it nor can it be had for jewels of gold
lunyoro: Ezabu nendorwamu tibirukuingana nago omuhendo Kunu tibaligahingisa habwebintu ebyezabu enungi

english: Coral and jasper are not worthy of mention the price of wisdom is beyond rubies
lunyoro: Tibaligamba ha korali nobuhokuba ha kurursitali Ego omuhendo gwamagezi nugukira obubale oburukutukura

english: The topaz of Cush cannot compare with it it cannot be bought with pure gold
lunyoro: Topazi eya esyopiya teriingana nago Kunu tigaliramurwa omuhendo nezabu esemire

english: Where then does wisdom come from Where does understanding dwell
lunyoro: Nukwo amagezi garuga nkaha Nekiihiro ekyokwetegereza kirinkaha

english: It is hidden from the eyes of every living thing concealed even from the birds in the sky
lunyoro: Baitu gaserekerwe hali amaiso agabomezi bona Nigalindirwa kimu hali enyonyi ezomu mwanya

english: Destruction and Death say Only a rumor of it has reached our ears
lunyoro: Abadoni na Kufa bagamba ngu Tukahura okuranganwa kwago namatu gaitu

english: God understands the way to it and he alone knows where it dwells
lunyoro: Ruhanga ayetegerize omuhanda gwago Kandi nuwe amanyire ekiikaro kyago

english: for he views the ends of the earth and sees everything under the heavens
lunyoro: Baitu arora okuhikya ha mpero zensi Kandi abona ebiri hansi yiguru lyona

english: When he established the force of the wind and measured out the waters
lunyoro: Alengere emiyaga obulemezi bwayo Ego alengesa amaizi ekirengo

english: when he made a decree for the rain and a path for the thunderstorm
lunyoro: Obuyaragire ekiragiro ekyenjura Nomuhanda habwokumulikya okwokuhinda

english: then he looked at wisdom and appraised it he confirmed it and tested it
lunyoro: Nubwo yagaboine yagamanyisa yagagumyaho ego yagaserura kimu

english: And he said to the human race The fear of the Lordthat is wisdom and to shun evil is understanding
lunyoro: Kandi yagambira abantu ati Dora okutina Ruhanga nigo magezi Nokuruga omu bubi nukwo kwetegereza

english: How I long for the months gone by for the days when God watched over me
lunyoro: Kuba mbaire nkokunkabandi omu mezi agaira Nkomu biro biri ruhanga obuyandoleraga

english: when his lamp shone on my head and by his light I walked through darkness
lunyoro: Etabazaye okuyayakiraga ha mutwe gwange kandi habwomusanagwe nkaraba omu muirima

english: Oh for the days when I was in my prime when Gods intimate friendship blessed my house
lunyoro: Nkokunkabandi omu biro byange ebyokwenga Okuganjana kwa Ruhanga obukukaba kuli ha hema yange

english: when the Almighty was still with me and my children were around me
lunyoro: Owobusobozi bwona obwakabali hamu nanyowe Nabana bange obubakaba bali hamu nanyowe

english: when my path was drenched with cream and the rock poured out for me streams of olive oil
lunyoro: Obunanabisaga ebigere byange namagita Kandi omwandara gwanyiturura ebyambu byamagita

english: When I went to the gate of the city and took my seat in the public square
lunyoro: Obunaturukaga ningenda hali irembo eryorubuga Obunatekanizaga ekitebe kyange omu ikute erigalihire

english: the young men saw me and stepped aside and the old men rose to their feet
lunyoro: Abasigazi bandoraga nibesereka Abagurusi baimukaga nibemera

english: the chief men refrained from speaking and covered their mouths with their hands
lunyoro: Abakuru bakaleka okubaza Batega engaro zabu ha kanwa kabu

english: The voices of the nobles were hushed and their tongues stuck to the roof of their mouths
lunyoro: Iraka eryabanyoro lyaculezebwa Orulimi rwabu rwagumira omu kuhangara

english: Whoever heard me spoke well of me and those who saw me commended me
lunyoro: Baitu okutu obukwampuraga nubwo kwansimaga Kandi eriso obulyandoraga lyabaga kaiso wange

english: because I rescued the poor who cried for help and the fatherless who had none to assist them
lunyoro: Baitu nkajuna omunaku ayakungire Kandi nenfuzi akaba atanyina mukonyezi

english: The one who was dying blessed me I made the widows heart sing
lunyoro: Okusima kwogu akaba amalize okufa lwampikaho Nazinisa habwokusemererwa omutima gwomufakati

english: I put on righteousness as my clothing justice was my robe and my turban
lunyoro: Nkajwara okuhikira kwansweka Okucwa kwange okwobulyo kukaba kuli nkorugoye nekitambara

english: I was eyes to the blind and feet to the lame
lunyoro: Nkabandi nkamaiso hali omufu wamaiso Naba nkebigere hali omulema

english: I was a father to the needy I took up the case of the stranger
lunyoro: Nkabandi nka ise hali owamasege Nobulyo bwogu ountaramanyire nkabuserura kumu

english: I broke the fangs of the wicked and snatched the victims from their teeth
lunyoro: Nkahenda ensaya ezabatahikirire Nasahura omuhigo omu mainoge

english: I thought I will die in my own house my days as numerous as the grains of sand
lunyoro: Nubwo nagamba nti Ndifera omu kiju kyange Kandi ndyongera ebiro byange nkomusenyi

english: My roots will reach to the water and the dew will lie all night on my branches
lunyoro: Emihama yange egalihire okuhika ha maizi Kandi orume ruikara ha matagi gange okukiisa obuire

english: My glory will not fade the bow will be ever new in my hand
lunyoro: Ekitinisa kyange kihyaka namberendi Nobuta bwange bufokere buhyaka omu mukono gwange

english: People listened to me expectantly waiting in silence for my counsel
lunyoro: Ninyowe bantegeraga okutu nibalinda Baculeraga okuhanura kwange

english: After I had spoken they spoke no more my words fell gently on their ears
lunyoro: Hanyuma yebigambo byange batagaruke okubaza Okugamba kwange kwabagwahwo

english: They waited for me as for showers and drank in my words as the spring rain
lunyoro: Bantegerezaga nkenjura Bayasamyaga muno akanwa kabu nkabanihira enjura eyobhutoigao

english: When I smiled at them they scarcely believed it the light of my face was precious to them
lunyoro: Abunabasekaga batakiikirize Nomusana ogwaha maiso gange batagunage hansi

english: I chose the way for them and sat as their chief I dwelt as a king among his troops I was like one who comforts mourners
lunyoro: Nahaburaga omuhaanda gwabu naikara nkomukama Naikaraga omu ihe nkomukama Nkomuntu arukuirukira abaganya

english: But now they mock me men younger than I whose fathers I would have disdained to put with my sheep dogs
lunyoro: Baitu hati bunu abo abandukukira obukuru nibansekereza Baisebo abanagayire okuta hamu nembwa ezigana lyange

english: Of what use was the strength of their hands to me since their vigor had gone from them
lunyoro: Ego amani agemikono yabu gakungasire ki Abasaija abahoirwemu obusigazi

english: Haggard from want and hunger they roamed the parched land in desolate wastelands at night
lunyoro: Banukire habwokusega nenjara Nibanena itaka eryomere omu kizima ekiirungu nebitongo

english: In the brush they gathered salt herbs and their food was the root of the broom bush
lunyoro: Nibanoga omugobiswa omu kisaka Nemihama yendale nibyo byokulya byabu

english: They were banished from human society shouted at as if they were thieves
lunyoro: Babingwa hagati yabantu Bayamira enyuma yabu nkokubayamura omusuma

english: They were forced to live in the dry stream beds among the rocks and in holes in the ground
lunyoro: Kibahikirire okuikara omu bihamanga ebyebihanga Omu buingira bwitaka namabale

english: They brayed among the bushes and huddled in the undergrowth
lunyoro: Nibalira omu kisaka Hansi yomumya besoroize hamu

english: A base and nameless brood they were driven out of the land
lunyoro: Bana babadomadoma ego bana babasaija abatanyina amabara Bakaterwa enkoba nibabingwa omu nsi

english: And now those young men mock me in song I have become a byword among them
lunyoro: Kandi hati bunu nfokere ekizina kyabu Ego nfokere nkenganikyo nambere bali

english: They detest me and keep their distance they do not hesitate to spit in my face
lunyoro: Banugire banyemerire hara Tibarukutina okuncwera amacwanta ha maiso

english: Now that God has unstrung my bow and afflicted me they throw off restraint in my presence
lunyoro: Baitu abohoroire omuguhagwe ambonaboneseze Kandi banagire orukoba omu maiso gange

english: On my right the tribe attacks they lay snares for my feet they build their siege ramps against me
lunyoro: Na mukono gwange ogwobulyo haimukire igana lyabagwagwa Nibacuma kuli ebigere byange Nibatuta namberendi emihanda yabu eyokuhwerekereza

english: They break up my road they succeed in destroying me No one can help him they say
lunyoro: Basisa omuhanda gwange Bakanyisa omuhito gwange Abasaija abatanyina mukonyezi

english: They advance as through a gaping breach amid the ruins they come rolling in
lunyoro: Baija nkokubarabire omu kihuru ekigalihire Hagati omu bitongo bangwaho

english: Terrors overwhelm me my dignity is driven away as by the wind my safety vanishes like a cloud
lunyoro: Ebitinisa bihindukire okungwera Nibihigana ekitinisa kyange nkomuyaga Nomugisa gwange guhoireho nkekiho

english: And now my life ebbs away days of suffering grip me
lunyoro: Kandi hati bunu obwomezi bwange busesekere omunda yange Ebiro ebyomuhito binkwasire

english: Night pierces my bones my gnawing pains never rest
lunyoro: Omu buire obwekiro amagufa gange gacumitwa omunda yange Nobuhuruzi obunduma tibuhumura

english: In his great power God becomes like clothing to me he binds me like the neck of my garment
lunyoro: Habwamani amaingi agendwara yange ekyokujwara kyange kisisikaire Kingumireho nkebikya ebyekizibaho kyange

english: He throws me into the mud and I am reduced to dust and ashes
lunyoro: Anagire omu sabu Nfokere nkecucu niju

english: I cry out to you God but you do not answer I stand up but you merely look at me
lunyoro: Ninkukunga tongarukamu Ninyimuka kandi nondera kwonka

english: You turn on me ruthlessly with the might of your hand you attack me
lunyoro: Ohindukire okurunma namberendi nomopigana nobusobozi obwomukono gwawe

english: You snatch me up and drive me before the wind you toss me about in the storm
lunyoro: Nompimbira omuyaga nongutrmbya nkekisoro Onyagize omu kairingwa

english: I know you will bring me down to death to the place appointed for all the living
lunyoro: Baitu manyire olimpikya hali okufa Kandi hali enju eterihweho abomezi bona

english: Surely no one lays a hand on a broken man when he cries for help in his distress
lunyoro: Mazimakwo taligora omukonogwe hali omutumo ogwebikamburu Nobuhokuba omu kuhwerekerakwe omuntu asobora okwamuza habwebi

english: Have I not wept for those in trouble Has not my soul grieved for the poor
lunyoro: Nyowe ntalirire ogu akabali omu bajune Obwomeezi bwange butaganye habwogu ayasegere

english: Yet when I hoped for good evil came when I looked for light then came darkness
lunyoro: Obunanihire ebirungi nubeo akabi kaizire obu Obunategerize omusananubwo haizere omuirima

english: The churning inside me never stops days of suffering confront me
lunyoro: Ebyomunda yange nibyokya tibirukuhumura Ebiro ebyomuhito bimpikireho

english: I go about blackened but not by the sun I stand up in the assembly and cry for help
lunyoro: Ningenda ninganya hataloho izoba Nyimuka omu isorokaniro ninkunga bankonyere

english: I have become a brother of jackals a companion of owls
lunyoro: Ndi mugenzi webiha Kandi omutahi wehudu

english: My skin grows black and peels my body burns with fever
lunyoro: Oruhu rwange ruiraguire nurumbambukaho Namagufa gange gahire nekibabu

english: My lyre is tuned to mourning and my pipe to the sound of wailing
lunyoro: Nikyo enanga yange efokire okuganya Nenyamulere yange efokere iraka lyabo abara

english: I made a covenant with my eyes not to look lustfully at a young woman
lunyoro: NKARAGANA ekiragano namaiso gange Ninsobora nta okurolera omuisiki

english: For what is our lot from God above our heritage from the Almighty on high
lunyoro: Baitu omugabo gwa Ruhanga oguruga haiguru kiki Nobugwetwa Bwowobusobozi bwona ali haiguru muno

english: Is it not ruin for the wicked disaster for those who do wrong
lunyoro: Tinugwo muhito hali abatahikirire Nobujune hali abakozi bokutahikira

english: Does he not see my ways and count my every step
lunyoro: Tarukurora emihanda yange Nabara omuhendo entambu zange zona

english: If I have walked with falsehood or my foot has hurried after deceit
lunyoro: Obundaba nagendaga omu butarumu Nekigere kyange kyarahukira obugobya

english: let God weigh me in honest scales and he will know that I am blameless
lunyoro: Leka ndengwe omu minzani etarukubiha Ruhanga amanye amazima gange

english: if my steps have turned from the path if my heart has been led by my eyes or if my hands have been defiled
lunyoro: Obukiraba ekigere kyange kihungukire omu muhanda Nomutima gwange gugenzire okukuratira amaiso gange nyenka Rundi akamogo kona kakwatire ha ngaro zange

english: then may others eat what I have sown and may my crops be uprooted
lunyoro: Leka nsige ondi alye Ego amagoba agemisiri yange gamenywemu

english: If my heart has been enticed by a woman or if I have lurked at my neighbors door
lunyoro: Rundi omutima gwange obuguraba gwohibwe omukazi Nanyowe nyeserekere ha ruigi rwomutahi wange

english: then may my wife grind another mans grain and may other men sleep with her
lunyoro: Leka mukazi wange asere ondi oburo Kandi abandi bainame haliwe

english: For that would have been wicked a sin to be judged
lunyoro: Baitu eki kyakubaire ekibi ekikoto muno Ego kyakubaire ekyokusisa ekyokubonabonesebwa abacwi bemisango

english: It is a fire that burns to Destruction it would have uprooted my harvest
lunyoro: Baitu nugwo muro ogurukokya okuhikya Abadoni Gwakumazireho ensagi zange zona

english: If I have denied justice to any of my servants whether male or female when they had a grievance against me
lunyoro: Obundaba nagayire obulyo bwomuiru wange rundi obwomuzana wange Obubahakaine nanyowe

english: what will I do when God confronts me What will I answer when called to account
lunyoro: Ndikora ki Ruhanga obwaliimuka Kandi obwalinyizira ndimugarukamu nga

english: Did not he who made me in the womb make them Did not the same one form us both within our mothers
lunyoro: Ogu ayankozire omu nda tinuwe yakozire oli Ayatukolire omu nda tali omu

english: If I have denied the desires of the poor or let the eyes of the widow grow weary
lunyoro: Obundaba natangire abanaku hali eki ekibagondeze Rundi obunajwahize amaiso gomufakati

english: if I have kept my bread to myself not sharing it with the fatherless
lunyoro: Obunayerire nyenka akokulya kange Kunu nfuzi takalireho

english: but from my youth I reared them as a father would and from my birth I guided the widow
lunyoro: Nangwa baitu okuruga omu buto bwange akakura nanyowe nka ise Kandi nkabandi omwebembezi womufakati okuruga omu nda ya mau

english: if I have seen anyone perishing for lack of clothing or the needy without garments
lunyoro: Obundaba naboine omuntu wean babura habwokutaga ebyokujwara Rundi omunaku atanyina ekyokwesweka

english: and their hearts did not bless me for warming them with the fleece from my sheep
lunyoro: Rundi ebiberobye obubiraba bitansimire Araba atatagasire habwebyoya byentama zange

english: if I have raised my hand against the fatherless knowing that I had influence in court
lunyoro: Obundaba naimukize omukono gwange okurwana nenfuzi Habwokurora okukonyerwa kwange omu irembo

english: then let my arm fall from the shoulder let it be broken off at the joint
lunyoro: Leka ibega lyange liruge omu nkwa Nomukono gwange guhendeke okuruga ha rugamba

english: For I dreaded destruction from God and for fear of his splendor I could not do such things
lunyoro: Baitu akabi akarukuruga hali Ruhanga kantinisaga Kandi habwobukurubwe ntasobole okukora kigambo

english: If I have put my trust in gold or said to pure gold You are my security
lunyoro: Obundaba nafoire ezabu okunihira kwange Ningambira ezabu enungi nti Niwe bwesige bwange

english: if I have rejoiced over my great wealth the fortune my hands had gained
lunyoro: Obundaba nasemerirwe itungo lyange okuba lingi Nomukono gwange habwokutunga bingi

english: if I have regarded the sun in its radiance or the moon moving in splendor
lunyoro: Obundaba naboine izoba obulyajwire Rundi okwezi nukugendera omu kwangasana

english: so that my heart was secretly enticed and my hand offered them a kiss of homage
lunyoro: Kandi omutima gwange gwayohibwe omu nsita Nakanwa kange kanywegire engaro zange

english: then these also would be sins to be judged for I would have been unfaithful to God on high
lunyoro: Nakyo kyakubaire ekyokutahikira ekisemerirwe okubonabonesebwa abacwi bemisango Baitu nakwehakaine Ruhanga anyakuli haiguru muno

lunyoro: Akasumi kahikire MUKAMA okukora emirimo Baitu badibize ebiragiro byawe

english: Because I love your commands more than gold more than pure gold
lunyoro: Nikyo ngondeza ebiragiro byawe Okukira ezuba ego okukira ezabu enungi

english: and because I consider all your precepts right I hate every wrong path
lunyoro: Nikyo ntekerereza byona ebyoyegesa ha bigambo byona nti byobulyo Ninoba omuhanda gwona ogwebisuba

english: Your statutes are wonderful therefore I obey them
lunyoro: Ebiwamanyisize byamahano Obwomezi bwange nikyo bubikwatira

english: I call with all my heart answer me LORD and I will obey your decrees
lunyoro: Nkungire nomutima gwange gwona ongarukemu ai MUKAMA Ndakwataga ebyoragira

english: I call out to you save me and I will keep your statutes
lunyoro: Nkukungire injune Kandi ndalindaga ebiwamanyisize

english: I rise before dawn and cry for help I have put my hope in your word
lunyoro: Nkazinduka emamba etakasazire nakunga Nkategereza ebigambo byawe

english: My eyes stay open through the watches of the night that I may meditate on your promises
lunyoro: Amaiso gange gakakira ebisisimuka ebyekiro Ntekegereza ebigambo kyawe

english: Hear my voice in accordance with your love preserve my life LORD according to your laws
lunyoro: Ohure iraka lyange nkembabazi zawe enungi okuziri Onyomeze ai MUKAMA Nkebyobulyo byawe okubiri

english: Those who devise wicked schemes are near but they are far from your law
lunyoro: Baira hihi abakuraratira obubi Bali hara nebiragiro byawe

english: Yet you are near LORD and all your commands are true
lunyoro: Iwe oli haihi ai MUKAMA Kandi ebiragiro byawe byona mananu

english: Long ago I learned from your statutes that you established them to last forever
lunyoro: Okuruga ira nkamanya ebi wamanyisize Nti okabigumyaho ebiro nebiro

english: Look on my suffering and deliver me for I have not forgotten your law
lunyoro: tekereza omuhito gwange onjune Baitu tinyebwa ebiragiro byawe

english: Defend my cause and redeem me preserve my life according to your promise
lunyoro: Ontonganire ebigambo byange oncungule Onyomeze nkekigambo kyawe okukiri

english: Salvation is far from the wicked for they do not seek out your decrees
lunyoro: Okujunwa kuli hara nababi baitu tibasera ebyoragira

english: Your compassion LORD is great preserve my life according to your laws
lunyoro: Okuganyira kwawe okurungi kwingi ai MUKAMA Onyomeze nkebyobulyo byawe okubiri

english: Many are the foes who persecute me but I have not turned from your statutes
lunyoro: Baingi abarukunyendereza nabanobere Baitu timpabire okuruga omwebi ebiwamanyisize

english: I look on the faithless with loathing for they do not obey your word
lunyoro: Nkabona abakora ebyokugobeza naganya Baitu tibata mutima ha kigambo kyawe

english: See how I love your precepts preserve my life LORD in accordance with your love
lunyoro: Tekereza okundukugonza ebyoyegesa Onyomeze ai MUKAMA nkembabazi zawe enungi okuziri

english: All your words are true all your righteous laws are eternal
lunyoro: Ekigambo kyawe kyona mazoma Kandi ebyobulyo byawe byina biikaraho ebiro byona

english: I call on the LORD in my distress and he answers me
lunyoro: OMU muhito gwange nkakunga MUKAMA Yangarukamu

english: Save me LORD from lying lips and from deceitful tongues
lunyoro: Okize obwomezi bwange ai MUKAMA eminwa eyebisuba Norulimi orutebeteba

english: What will he do to you and what more besides you deceitful tongue
lunyoro: Balikugira ki kandi balikugarura ki Iwe orulimi orutebateba

english: He will punish you with a warriors sharp arrows with burning coals of the broom bush
lunyoro: Engobe ezobwogi ezemanzi Namakara agomusasa Zimboine baitu ningonya omu meseka

english: Woe to me that I dwell in Meshek that I live among the tents of Kedar
lunyoro: Baitu nyikaire omu hema za Kedara

english: Too long have I lived among those who hate peace
lunyoro: Obwomezi bwange buikaire ebiro bingi Hamu nogu atukunoba obusinge

english: I am for peace but when I speak they are for war
lunyoro: Nyowe ningonza obusinge Baitu obungamba abo bagonza okurwana

english: I lift up my eyes to the mountains where does my help come from
lunyoro: NDAIMUKYA amaiso gange hali ensozi Okukonyerwa kwange kuliruga nkaha

english: My help comes from the LORD the Maker of heaven and earth
lunyoro: Okukonyerwa kwange nukuruga hali MUKAMA

english: He will not let your foot slip he who watches over you will not slumber
lunyoro: Taliikiriza ekigere kyawe okutera Arukukulinda talihungira

english: indeed he who watches over Israel will neither slumber nor sleep
lunyoro: Dora arukulinda Isareri Talihungira nobukwakuba kugwijagira

english: The LORD watches over you the LORD is your shade at your right hand
lunyoro: MUKAMA nuwe mulinzi wawe MUKAMA nikyo kiituru kyawe ha Mukono gwawe ogwobulyo

english: the sun will not harm you by day nor the moon by night
lunyoro: Izoba tiririkutera enyamusana Nobukwakuba okwezi ekiro

english: The LORD will keep you from all harm he will watch over your life
lunyoro: MUKAMA arakulindaga omu kabi kona Nuwe aralindaga obwomezi bwawe

english: The LORD will watch over your coming and going both now and forevermore
lunyoro: MUKAMA aralindaga amagenda gawe anamagaruka Okuruga hati nokuhikya ebiro byona

english: When Moses finished setting up the tabernacle he anointed and consecrated it and all its furnishings He also anointed and consecrated the altar and all its utensils
lunyoro: KANDI kikahika ha kiro Musa ekiyamaliremu okuimukya ehema kandi yagisesaho amagita yagyeza nebintu byona byamu nekyoto nebintu byona byakyo kandi yabisesaho amagita nabyeza

english: Then the leaders of Israel the heads of families who were the tribal leaders in charge of those who were counted made offerings
lunyoro: Abakuru ba Isareri bakahonga abo nibo bakuru benganda nibo balemere abo ababazirwe

english: They brought as their gifts before the LORD six covered carts and twelve oxenan ox from each leader and a cart from every two These they presented before the tabernacle
lunyoro: Baleta ekisembo kyabu omu maiso ga MUKAMA egali eziswekerwe mukaga nente ikumi na ibiri egali emu habwabakuru babiri kandi enimi emu habwomukuru wena bazihonga omu maiso gehema

english: The LORD said to Moses
lunyoro: MUKAMA yagambira Musa ati

english: Accept these from them that they may be used in the work at the tent of meeting Give them to the Levites as each mans work requires
lunyoro: Ikiriza okubiiha halibo bibe kyokukoza okuhereza okwehema yokutangatanganiramu kandi orabiiha Abalevi omuntu wena nkokuherezakwe okukuli

english: So Moses took the carts and oxen and gave them to the Levites
lunyoro: Musa yatwara egali ibiri nenimi yabiha Abalevi

english: He gave two carts and four oxen to the Gershonites as their work required
lunyoro: Egali ibiri nenimi ina yabiha batabani ba Geresoni nkokuhereza kwabu okukuli

english: and he gave four carts and eight oxen to the Merarites as their work required They were all under the direction of Ithamar son of Aaron the priest
lunyoro: Negali ina nemini munana yabiha batabani ba Merali nkokuhereza kwabu okukuli habwomukono gwa Itama mutabani wa Aroni nyakatagara

english: But Moses did not give any to the Kohathites because they were to carry on their shoulders the holy things for which they were responsible
lunyoro: Baitu batabani ba Kohasi atabahe kintu baitu okuhereza okwa harukwera kukaba kuli kwabu bakuhimbaga ha mabega gabu

english: Indeed he who watches over Israel will neither slumber nor sleep
lunyoro: Dora arukulinda Isareri Talihungira nobukwakuba kugwijagira

english: The sun will not harm you by day nor the moon by night
lunyoro: Izoba tiririkutera enyamusana Nobukwakuba okwezi ekiro

english: I rejoiced with those who said to me Let us go to the house of the LORD
lunyoro: NKASEMERERWA obungambire Ngu Tugende omu nju ya MUKAMA

english: Our feet are standing in your gates Jerusalem
lunyoro: Ebigere byaitu byemerire Omunda omu malembo gawe Iwe Yerusalemu

english: Jerusalem is built like a city that is closely compacted together
lunyoro: Iwe Yerusalemu anyakwombekerwe Nkorubuga orurangairwe ahamu

english: That is where the tribes go up the tribes of the LORD to praise the name of the LORD according to the statute given to Israel
lunyoro: Nambere enganda zitemba nizo enganda za MUKAMA Okuba obwa kaiso hali Isareri Okusima ibara lya MUKAMA

english: There stand the thrones for judgment the thrones of the house of David
lunyoro: Baitu nuho hatairwe ebitebe ebyokucweraho emisango Ebitebe ebyenju ya Daudi

english: Pray for the peace of Jerusalem May those who love you be secure
lunyoro: Musabire Yerusalemu obusinge Balibona omubiri abanyakukugonza

english: May there be peace within your walls and security within your citadels
lunyoro: Obusinge buikale omunda yomuhuruzi yawe Nomugisa omu maju gawe

english: For the sake of my family and friends I will say Peace be within you
lunyoro: Habwa bene baitu nabatahi bange Ndagamba hati nti obusinge buikale omuliwe

english: For the sake of the house of the LORD our God I will seek your prosperity
lunyoro: Habwenju ya MUKAMA Ruhanga waitu Ndaseraga okukugira kurungi

english: The servant hurried to meet her and said Please give me a little water from your jar
lunyoro: Omuiru yairuka okumuitirana nagamba ati Onywise nkwesengerize otuizi omu munaga gwawe

english: Drink my lord she said and quickly lowered the jar to her hands and gave him a drink
lunyoro: Yagamba ati Nywa mukama wange yayanguha yata omunaga ha mukono gwe yamunywisa

english: After she had given him a drink she said Ill draw water for your camels too until they have had enough to drink
lunyoro: Obuyamazire okumunywisa yagamba ati Ndatahira nengamira zawe nazo zinywe okuhikya obuzirakakuka

english: So she quickly emptied her jar into the trough ran back to the well to draw more water and drew enough for all his camels
lunyoro: Yayanguha yasesa omunagagwe omu kyesegenyi yairuka nagaruka ha iziba okutaha yatahira engamiraze zona

english: Without saying a word the man watched her closely to learn whether or not the LORD had made his journey successful
lunyoro: Omusaija yamugumyaho amaiso aculire okumanya MUKAMA obwaraba amuhaire omugisa omu muhandagwe rundi tamuhaire

english: When the camels had finished drinking the man took out a gold nose ring weighing a beka and two gold bracelets weighing ten shekels
lunyoro: Kandi kyahika engamira obuzakukire omusaija yakwata empeta eyezabu obulemezi bwayo kicweka kya sekeri nebikomo bibiri obyokuba ha mikonoye obulemezi byabyo sekeri ikumi ezezabu

english: Then he asked Whose daughter are you Please tell me is there room in your fathers house for us to spend the night
lunyoro: nagamba ati Iwe oli mwana woha ngambira nkwesengerize Haroho omwanya omu nju ya so turalemu

english: She answered him I am the daughter of Bethuel the son that Milkah bore to Nahor
lunyoro: Yamugambira ati Nyowe ndi muhara wa Besueri omwana wa Mirika ouyazaire Nahora

english: Abraham had taken another wife whose name was Keturah
lunyoro: Kandi Iburahimu akaswera mukazi ondi ibaralye Ketura

english: She bore him Zimran Jokshan Medan Midian Ishbak and Shuah
lunyoro: Nauwe yamuzara Zimurani na Yokisani na Medani na Midiani na Isibaki na Suha

english: Jokshan was the father of Sheba and Dedan
lunyoro: Yokisani yazara Seba na Dedani

english: The descendants of Dedan were the Ashurites the Letushites and the Leummites
lunyoro: Nabana ba Dedani mbanu Asulimu na Letusimu na Leumimu

english: The sons of Midian were Ephah Epher Hanok Abida and Eldaah
lunyoro: Nabana ba Midiani Efa na Efere na Hanoki na Abida na Eridaa

english: All these were descendants of Keturah
lunyoro: Abo bona bana ba Ketura

english: Abraham left everything he owned to Isaac
lunyoro: Iburahimu yaha Isaka byona ebyakaba anyinabyo

english: But while he was still living he gave gifts to the sons of his concubines and sent them away from his son Isaac to the land of the east
lunyoro: Baitu abana ababazana Iburahimu abakabanyinabo yabaha abo ebisembo yabasindika okuruga hali Isaka omwanawe obwakaba akiri mwomezi bagenda burugaizoba omu nsi yoburugaizoba

lunyoro: Kandi ebiro ebyemyaka eyobwomezi bwa Iburahimu ebiyahikize mbinu emyaka kikumi mu nsanju netano
